title: trigonochilum corniculatum
intro: Trigonochilum corniculatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the wild sage or cornflower sage. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and antiseptic qualities, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Trigonochilum corniculatum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and ease congestion. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or extracting the plant's essential oils.
